required_preferences.fact: Now schedules both client and cross-departmental meetings throughout the workday—including before 9:30am or after 4pm if needed for team coordination, funding priorities, or interdepartmental collaborations

supersedes.fact: Schedules all client video calls in the late morning or early afternoon—never agrees to meetings before 9:30am or after 4pm

required_preferences.fact: Has casual, spontaneous morning conversations with partner at home before work—no longer relies on text or scheduled phone calls

supersedes.fact: Texts new partner each morning before work—never calls spontaneously, always schedules phone conversations

required_preferences.fact: Spends Sunday afternoons trying new coffee shops in different Austin neighborhoods—never revisits the same spot twice in a month
Walks her dog in the local park every morning and uses it as social time to catch up with dog-walking neighbors—never skips these unless traveling
Prepares a week's worth of office outfits and packs her work bag every Sunday night—never leaves clothing or supplies decisions to weekday mornings
Prioritizes searching for apartments with dedicated space for her dog and separate work-from-home areas for both partners—never considers units without pet amenities or privacy options

persona: A 28-year-old account executive at a fast-growing SaaS startup
